## Process Agent Shortcuts (AI-GCE Generated)

The following shortcuts invoke governance agents. Type the shortcut anywhere in a chat prompt — the corresponding agent activates immediately. No further clarification needed.

**How it works:** The shortcut is a direct command. When the AI sees it in your prompt, it loads the corresponding agent from `.kiro/agents/` and executes its full check pass.

### Active Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Agent | When to Call | Tier |
|----------|-------|-------------|:----:|
| `CAA__` | `compliance-audit-agent` — Full Compliance Audit | On demand; after tier activation; before phase transition | 1 |
| `PRC__` | `pre-pr-checklist-agent` — Pre-PR Quality Checklist | Before creating any pull request | 2 |
| `SDC__` | `session-discipline-agent` — Session Discipline Check | Start of every AI coding session | 1 |
| `SGV__` | `sprint-governance-agent` — Sprint Governance Validation | Sprint start and sprint end | 2 |
| `CRV__` | `code-review-agent` — Code Review Verification | Before approving any PR | 2 |
| `SQC__` | `steering-quality-agent` — Steering Quality Check | After editing any `.kiro/steering/` file | 2 |
| `CMG__` | `change-management-agent` — Change Management Gate | Before any release or deployment | 3 |
| `DOD__` | `dod-gate-agent` — Definition of Done Gate | Before marking any task "complete" | 2 |

### Shortcut Rules

1. **`CAA__` triggers Compliance Audit.** When the user types `CAA__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/compliance-audit-agent.md` and execute its full audit pass. No clarification needed.

2. **`PRC__` triggers Pre-PR Checklist.** When the user types `PRC__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/pre-pr-checklist-agent.md` and execute its full 12-check verification. No clarification needed.

3. **`SDC__` triggers Session Discipline.** When the user types `SDC__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/session-discipline-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed.

4. **`SGV__` triggers Sprint Governance.** When the user types `SGV__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/sprint-governance-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed.

5. **`CRV__` triggers Code Review.** When the user types `CRV__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/code-review-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed.

6. **`SQC__` triggers Steering Quality.** When the user types `SQC__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/steering-quality-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed.

7. **`CMG__` triggers Change Management.** When the user types `CMG__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/change-management-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed.

8. **`DOD__` triggers Definition of Done.** When the user types `DOD__` anywhere in a prompt, invoke `.kiro/agents/dod-gate-agent.md` and execute its full check pass. No clarification needed.

### Tier Availability Note

Shortcuts for Tier 2/3 agents are registered from Day 0 but the agent will respond with "This agent activates at Tier {N} — your workspace is currently at Tier {current}. To activate, say 'Activate next compliance tier.'" if invoked before the tier is reached. This prevents confusion ("I typed the shortcut but nothing useful happened") and guides the user toward tier progression.

### Quick Guide

For full documentation on when to call each agent, what happens if you skip, and how to recover from missed invocations, see:

> **`.governance/AGENT-GUIDE.md`** — the complete process agent user manual.
